title: salvia sonomensis
intro: Salvia sonomensis, also known as Sonoma sage, is a perennial plant native to the coastal regions of California and Oregon. This plant is a member of the sage family and has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Salvia sonomensis include reduced inflammation, improved digestion, and potential antimicrobial properties. Herbal preparations of Salvia sonomensis can be made into teas, tinctures, or infusions, and are often used in traditional medicine to support overall well-being.
